name: Honey Ginger-Glazed Carrots
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds carrots, cut into 3-inch x 1/2-inch sticks
1 tablespoon finely chopped, peeled fresh gingerroot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a kettle, cover the carrots with salted water by 2 inches and bring to a boil, uncovered. Cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
2. While the carrots are cooking, melt the butter in a bowl over moderate heat. Add the honey and gingerroot, stirring until the butter is melted.
3. Drain the carrots well and toss with the honey glaze and salt and pepper to taste.
